name: DT
title: HL7 v2 DT Data Type
description: A date value in the format YYYY[MM[DD]]. The minimum precision is to the year (4 digits). Month and day components are optional but must appear in order. If month is present, it must be a valid month (01-12). If day is present, it must be a valid day for the given month and year.

element.definition: A date value in the format YYYY[MM[DD]]. The minimum precision is to the year (4 digits). Month and day components are optional but must appear in order.
